2025年の崖は単なる警告でなく、負債を清算し競争力を取り戻す期限だ。サポート終了は脆弱性とコスト増を招く。現状を可視化し、段階的なクラウド移行を策定せよ。技術的負債の放置は事業停止リスクと同義である。

#DX #レガシーシステム

external.description:
### ITシステム刷新の見通しを明確にする

2025年までの間に、企業は現状のITシステムを見直し、必要なシステムの刷新計画を立てることが求められます。特に、老朽化したレガシーシステムを使い続けることは、DX推進の大きな障害となり、将来的な業務の柔軟性や競争力の低下につながるリスクがあります。そのため、企業は「DX実現シナリオ」を策定し、システム移行のロードマップを明確にすることが重要です。このシナリオでは、現行システムの課題を洗い出し、新システムの導入方針、技術選定、移行プロセスを具体的に計画する必要があります。また、段階的な移行を進めることで、業務への影響を最小限に抑えつつ、確実なシス
external.title: 2025年の崖とは？現状の課題と問題の対策方法をわかりやすく解説

embed.alt: A 15-second epic trailer for a Chinese period melodrama titled “Big Mountain Empire.” Vast mountain ranges rise above rolling clouds at dawn, revealing an imperial palace nestled among the peaks. A tragic romance unfolds through rapid emotional cuts: lovers separated by silk curtains, a woman’s tears falling onto a jade pendant, a man turning away to don armor and walk into war. A Mandarin Chinese voiceover speaks in a low, fate-driven tone about love, power, and destiny, with all dialogue and on-screen text in Chinese. The trailer ends with grand golden Chinese calligraphy forming from mountain textures as the title “大山帝国” appears, followed by a final deep drum hit and sudden silence.

embed.alt: A surreal psychological thriller trailer for the film Red Velvet Cake, unfolding like a dark 1980s arthouse dream. Pacing is slow and deliberate, with carefully composed edits rather than rapid cuts. A pristine red velvet cake sits under stark fluorescent lighting, its surface unnaturally perfect. A trembling hand presses a knife into the cake; deep crimson crumbs fall in weighted slow motion. Cut to a woman staring directly into camera, expression vacant, eyes slightly unfocused, as if trapped between thoughts. Final cut to black. The title RED VELVET CAKE appears in stark minimalist serif type, illuminated as if projected, with subtle film flicker and a low rumble fading into silence.

images.alt:
A detailed illustration of a stag beetle appears centered on a textured sheet of off-white paper. The insect is depicted from above with its legs spread outward and its body aligned vertically. Its defining feature, a pair of large curved mandibles extending upward from the head, forms an elegant horn-like shape that frames the top of the composition.

The beetle’s body is rendered with a combination of fine ink lines and soft watercolor washes. The head and thorax appear darker, shaded in cool charcoal tones with subtle highlights that give the exoskeleton a slightly metallic appearance. The abdomen is lighter, transitioning into warm brown and amber hues that fade softly across the segmented shell.

Thin spiny legs extend outward from the body, each joint carefully drawn with delicate lines that capture the insect’s natural structure. The mandibles curve inward at the tips, giving the beetle its distinctive silhouette. Small splatters and stains of watercolor surround the insect, suggesting a naturalist’s sketchbook or field study where ink and pigment have lightly bled into the paper.

Behind the beetle, faint tan stains and irregular washes spread across the page like dried pigment or aged paper marks. The background remains mostly empty, allowing the insect’s form and intricate anatomy to stand out clearly. The overall effect resembles a scientific illustration or entomological study, combining artistic expression with observational detail.

Keywords

images.alt:
A beach volleyball player stands beside a tall net under a bright, cloudless sky. The scene is captured from a low angle looking upward, emphasizing the athlete’s strong stance and the height of the net rising beside her. Sunlight floods the scene from above, creating a dramatic glow that highlights the contours of her body and the reflective surface of her sports sunglasses.

She wears a fitted athletic uniform in white and orange, consisting of a long-sleeve performance crop top and matching shorts. The fabric appears slightly dusty with sand, suggesting recent movement and play on the court. A thin orange sash or strap sits at her waist, and protective athletic tape or wraps appear around her knee and parts of her leg.

Her hair is pulled back into a practical bun, keeping it out of the way for play. With one hand, she adjusts the edge of her large mirrored sport goggles while looking toward the bright horizon, her expression focused and composed as if anticipating the next serve or rally.

The volleyball net runs vertically along the left side of the frame, its grid pattern catching the sunlight. Fine particles of sand appear suspended in the warm air near the ground, giving the scene a slightly hazy, sun-drenched atmosphere.

The composition conveys energy and readiness, with the athlete poised between motion and stillness against a vast sky that fades from pale blue to bright white around the sun.

Keywords
beach volleyball athlete, low angle sports portrait, sunlit athletic scene, sand court competition, reflective sport sunglasses, orange and white uniform, volleyball net detail, coastal sports environment, dynamic summer athletics, bright sky backdrop
